ColumnMapSerializer - Interface in com.marklogic.spring.batch.columnmap
Strategy interface for how a Spring "column map" can be written to a String of JSON or XML or, really, whatever you want.

DefaultStaxColumnMapSerializer - Class in com.marklogic.spring.batch.columnmap
Simple implementation that uses StAX - https://docs.oracle.com/javase/tutorial/jaxp/stax/index.html - for generating an XML document from a Spring column map.

MarkLogicItemWriter - Class in com.marklogic.spring.batch.item.writer
The MarkLogicItemWriter is an ItemWriter used to write any type of document to MarkLogic.
